Title: Implement SpatialAnalyzer.cs in Agent.Vision
Description:
ISpatialAnalyzer is defined but WorldVision is just a stub. Implement SpatialAnalyzer that computes:
- FlatnessRatio: sample terrain in a radius, compute variance of Y values
- TreeCoverage: count leaf/log blocks in radius / total blocks
- WaterProximity: nearest water block distance

Inputs: WorldState.Facts (populated from Mineflayer blockAt/radar events)
Outputs: SpatialAnalysis record with metrics and Tags (e.g. 'flat', 'forest', 'near-water')

Feed into GatherWoodGoal: before planning, run SpatialAnalyzer and pick the direction with highest tree coverage for the MoveTo action.
